# ventura-v2 — the feed, as Drift sees it

*57 posts over a week. Generated by claude-haiku-4-5, seed 1234. This is the public feed only — no hidden context.*

> Supersedes the ventura-v1 read: producer fixes applied (coffee de-densified + capped per category, de-templated org voice, three genuine public good-news moments added, public events surfaced once per person/day). Re-baselined — prior numbers do not transfer.

## Day 1

- **Dana Rivera** · `feed`  
  laptop is officially juice-logged 🙃 maya i love you but like... come on. anyway good monday everyone
- **Buena High Athletics** · `feed`  
  Summer volleyball camp starts Monday—spots still open for middle and high school players. Come work with our varsity squad and see what you're made of.
- **Driftwood Roasters** · `feed`  
  Just pulled the first batch of our new Ethiopian natural process—it's got this bright berry thing that tastes even better on a cold morning. In stock now.
- **Kelp Surf Co.** · `feed`  
  New FCS II fins just landed. Grabbed a few sets that have been solid in the current swell. Stop by if you want to feel the difference before committing.
- **Ventura County News** · `feed`  
  Ventura County Library's bookmobile is back on the road after maintenance. Check the schedule at venturacolibrary.org if you want to catch it in your neighborhood this week.

## Day 2

  dc coffee hits different when you're sleep deprived. not complaining tho 🤖☕

  ok real question: has anyone done the ethiopian natural from driftwood yet? been wanting to try it but also debating if i should just stick with my usual or go rogue this morning

  pier was packed before 7am. can't even get a decent spot anymore without tripping over a tourist with a phone. used to be you'd see maybe 5 guys out there.

  kid just spilled an entire cup of juice on my laptop lmaooo 😭 why do they always go for the electronics. she's apologizing but also i'm pretty sure i deserve a medal for not losing it rn
- **Mark Delgado** · `feed`  
  dc coffee hits different when you're sleep deprived. not complaining tho 🤖☕
- **Buena High Athletics** · `feed`  
  Football conditioning starts tomorrow at 6:30am on the upper field. Bring water and be ready to work—our guys are putting in the real effort this summer.
- **Ventura County News** · `feed`  
  Ventura County Sheriff's Office is hosting a free community safety workshop Saturday at the Ojai Fairgrounds—covers home security, fraud prevention, and what to do during a traffic stop. Registration closes Friday.
- **Coastal Sounds** · `feed`  
  finally got the recordings from last month's basement show mixed down. it's rough in the best way. dropping the live tape tomorrow if anyone wants to hear what actually happened that night.
- **Kelp Surf Co.** · `feed`  
  we're doing a pop-up repair station tomorrow morning (9-12). bring in your board, wetsuit, or bag—our guy will handle minor fixes while you wait. free for small stuff.

  opening's tonight if anyone's around. nervous in that specific way where i've arranged and rearranged the same three bowls like five times. anyway. 7pm at the studio if you want to stop by

  driftwood was packed this morning absolute zoo. couldn't even get a board wax without bumping into like 6 people
- **Driftwood Roasters** · `feed`  
  We're doing half-price pour-overs until 2pm today if you need an excuse to sit around longer. New Zealand natural honey process is especially good at that price.
- **Ventura County News** · `feed`  
  The Ventura County Air Quality Management District is forecasting unhealthy air conditions through Wednesday due to offshore winds pushing pollution inland—sensitive groups should limit outdoor activity and keep inhalers handy.
- **Coastal Sounds** · `feed`  
  been playing the same three songs on repeat for a week trying to nail the arrangement. might finally have it. playing them at Cafe Ficelle next Friday if you want to hear how it turned out.

  Girls soccer is hosting a free skills clinic Saturday morning at 7am for anyone interested in trying out this fall. No experience necessary—just bring cleats and show up.

  Caltrans is closing both directions of Highway 101 between Seacliff and Victoria Avenue tonight from 9 p.m. to 5 a.m. for pavement work. Plan alternate routes if you're traveling through Ventura.

  flight keeps getting pushed back and now the airport wifi is doing that thing where it connects but doesn't actually work. been staring at the same slack message for 20 minutes 😅
- **Pacific Pier Cafe** · `feed`  
  Foggy morning at the pier means we're running a fresh batch of sourdough through the toaster all day. Come warm up with coffee that actually tastes like something.
- **Coastal Sounds** · `feed`  
  heading to the studio tomorrow to track drums for the new stuff—first time recording with our full lineup and honestly nervous about it in a good way. might post clips if they don't sound like chaos.
- **Kelp Surf Co.** · `feed`  
  just restocked Patagonia rashguards in short sleeve. water's been cold enough that most people are moving past them, but we've got the good ones if you're looking before it warms up.
- **Buena High Athletics** · `feed`  
  Boys basketball is running pickup games every Thursday night at 6pm through August—open to anyone who wants to play. Good competition, good people, always room for one more.

  Cross country team is heading out for their long run Saturday morning at 7am from the stadium—if you're thinking about joining in the fall, this is a perfect chance to run with them and see what the program's about.
- **Coastal Sounds** · `feed`  
  got asked to book a small run of shows at The Spot for November and spent most of today just figuring out which bands actually want to play a Tuesday night. if you know anyone worth having on, send them my way.

- **Driftwood Roasters** · `feed`  
  Restocked our Peru microlot this morning—the roast came out cleaner than expected, so it's hitting different than last time we had it. Back on the shelf now.
- **Kelp Surf Co.** · `feed`  
  just got a shipment of Softech boards in—fun mid-length shapes that are forgiving enough to actually enjoy learning on instead of fighting the whole time. we've got a few in stock if you want to test one out this week.
- **Ventura County News** · `feed`  
  Ventura Water is asking residents to reduce usage through Friday as crews conduct system maintenance in East Ventura. Brief pressure drops are possible—fill bathtubs or containers if you rely on stored water for irrigation.
- **Patagonia** · `feed`  
  We're hosting a repair workshop this Saturday at our Ventura shop—bring in your worn jackets, packs, anything fixable. Free, no purchase necessary. Fighting the throwaway cycle starts with learning how to keep what we own.
